revision.comment: Bot: create automatic enwiki redirect
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Administrative divisions of Japan]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Administrative divisions of Japan]] <nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>

revision.comment: Bot: sync with enwiki
revision.text:
{{Sidebar |name = Administrative divisions of Japan |width = auto |wraplinks = true |titlestyle = padding-bottom:0.6em; |title = [[Administrative divisions of Japan|Administrative divisions
of Japan]] |headingstyle = background:#ddf; |contentclass = plainlist |contentstyle = padding:0.15em 0 0.6em; |heading1 = Prefectural |content1 = [[Prefectures of Japan|Prefectures]] |heading2 = Sub-prefectural |content2 = *[[Subprefectures of Japan|Subprefectures]] |heading3 = [[Municipalities of Japan|Municipal]] |content3 = *[[Cities designated by government ordinance of Japan|Designated cities]] *[[Core cities of Japan|Core cities]] *[[Special cities of Japan|Special cities]] *[[Cities of Japan|Cities]] ([[List of cities in Japan|List]]) *[[Special wards of Tokyo|Special wards (Tokyo)]] *[[List of towns in Japan|Towns]] *[[List of villages in Japan|Villages]] |heading4 = Sub-municipal |content4 = *[[Wards of Japan|Wards]] }}{{main other|[[Category:Subdivisions of Japan]]}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Japan}} [[Category:Japan subdivision templates| ]] [[Category:Administrative divisions by country sidebar templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:

of Japan]] |headingstyle = background:#ddf; |contentclass = plainlist |contentstyle = padding:0.15em 0 0.6em; |heading1 = Prefectural |content1 = [[:en:Prefectures of Japan|Prefectures]] |heading2 = Sub-prefectural |content2 = *[[:en:Subprefectures of Japan|Subprefectures]] |heading3 = [[:en:Municipalities of Japan|Municipal]] |content3 = *[[:en:Cities designated by government ordinance of Japan|Designated cities]] *[[:en:Core cities of Japan|Core cities]] *[[:en:Special cities of Japan|Special cities]] *[[:en:Cities of Japan|Cities]] ([[:en:en:List of cities in Japan|List]]) *[[:en:Special wards of Tokyo|Special wards (Tokyo)]] *[[List of towns in Japan|Towns]] *[[List of villages in Japan|Villages]] |heading4 = Sub-municipal |content4 = *[[:en:Wards of Japan|Wards]] }}{{main other|[[Category:Subdivisions of Japan]]}} {{citation needed|Japan}} [[Category:Japan subdivision templates| ]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text:
{{Sidebar |name = Administrative divisions of Japan |width = auto |wraplinks = true |titlestyle = padding-bottom:0.6em; |title = [[:en:Administrative divisions of Japan|Administrative divisions
of Japan]] |headingstyle = background:#ddf; |contentclass = plainlist |contentstyle = padding:0.15em 0 0.6em; |heading1 = Prefectural |content1 = [[:en:Prefectures of Japan|Prefectures]] |heading2 = Sub-prefectural |content2 = *[[:en:Subprefectures of Japan|Subprefectures]] |heading3 = [[:en:Municipalities of Japan|Municipal]] |content3 = *[[:en:Cities designated by government ordinance of Japan|Designated cities]] *[[:en:Core cities of Japan|Core cities]] *[[:en:Special cities of Japan|Special cities]] *[[:en:Cities of Japan|Cities]] ([[:en:en:List of cities in Japan|List]]) *[[:en:Special wards of Tokyo|Special wards (Tokyo)]] *[[List of towns in Japan|Towns]] *[[List of villages in Japan|Villages]] |heading4 = Sub-municipal |content4 = *[[:en:Wards of Japan|Wards]] }}{{main other|[[Category:Subdivisions of Japan]]}} {{citation needed|Japan}} [[Category:Japan subdivision templates| ]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Sidebar |name = Administrative divisions of Japan |width = auto |wraplinks = true |titlestyle = padding-bottom:0.6em; |title = [[:en:Administrative divisions of Japan|Administrative divisions
of Japan]] |headingstyle = background:#ddf; |contentclass = plainlist |contentstyle = padding:0.15em 0 0.6em; |heading1 = Prefectural |content1 = [[:en:Prefectures of Japan|Prefectures]] |heading2 = Sub-prefectural |content2 = *[[:en:Subprefectures of Japan|Subprefectures]] |heading3 = [[:en:Municipalities of Japan|Municipal]] |content3 = *[[:en:Cities designated by government ordinance of Japan|Designated cities]] *[[:en:Core cities of Japan|Core cities]] *[[:en:Special cities of Japan|Special cities]] *[[:en:Cities of Japan|Cities]] ([[:en:en:List of cities in Japan|List]]) *[[:en:Special wards of Tokyo|Special wards (Tokyo)]] *[[List of towns in Japan|Towns]] *[[List of villages in Japan|Villages]] |heading4 = Sub-municipal |content4 = *[[:en:Wards of Japan|Wards]] }}{{main other|[[Category:Subdivisions of Japan]]}} {{citation needed|Japan}} [[Category:Japan subdivision templates| ]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23124421395|commit triggered pipeline]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Administrative_divisions_of_Japan here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Sidebar |name = Administrative divisions of Japan |width = auto |wraplinks = true |titlestyle = padding-bottom:0.6em; |title = [[:en:Administrative divisions of Japan|Administrative divisions
of Japan]] |headingstyle = background:#ddf; |contentclass = plainlist |contentstyle = padding:0.15em 0 0.6em; |heading1 = Prefectural |content1 = [[:en:Prefectures of Japan|Prefectures]] |heading2 = Sub-prefectural |content2 = *[[:en:Subprefectures of Japan|Subprefectures]] |heading3 = [[:en:Municipalities of Japan|Municipal]] |content3 = *[[:en:Cities designated by government ordinance of Japan|Designated cities]] *[[:en:Core cities of Japan|Core cities]] *[[:en:Special cities of Japan|Special cities]] *[[:en:Cities of Japan|Cities]] ([[:en:en:List of cities in Japan|List]]) *[[:en:Special wards of Tokyo|Special wards (Tokyo)]] *[[List of towns in Japan|Towns]] *[[List of villages in Japan|Villages]] |heading4 = Sub-municipal |content4 = *[[:en:Wards of Japan|Wards]] }}{{main other|}} {{citation needed|Japan}} [[Category:Japan subdivision templates| ]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Subdivisions of Japan]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] [[Category:Pages without wikidata]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
